title: Recruitment Process
description: Neuroartan recruitment follows the governed Human Resources operating sequence rather than an improvised application flow.

steps.title: Role opening authorized
steps.summary: A role enters recruitment only after the opening package and approval logic are complete.

steps.title: Recruitment record structure opened
steps.summary: The role is placed inside the governed recruitment structure before candidate intake begins.

steps.title: Candidate intake and CV handling
steps.summary: Candidate materials are linked to the role opening, intake path, and traceable record.

steps.title: Screening and initial evaluation
steps.summary: Candidates are assessed against the role definition, qualifications, and product-truth requirements.

steps.title: Interview and questionnaire sequence
steps.summary: Interviews are structured around the approved role opening and preserved as governed evaluation material.

steps.title: Recommendation and decision package
steps.summary: A traceable hiring recommendation is formed before executive decision routing.

steps.title: Offer handover and onboarding transition
steps.summary: Approved candidates transition into offer and onboarding continuity without losing role context.
